recommendations.title: All Is Bright
recommendations.overview: Two ne’er-do-wells from Quebec travel to New York City with a scheme to get rich quick selling Christmas trees.

recommendations.title: Need for Speed
recommendations.overview: The film revolves around a local street-racer who partners with a rich and arrogant business associate, only to find himself framed by his colleague and sent to prison. After he gets out, he joins a New York-to-Los Angeles race to get revenge. But wh

recommendations.title: Passing
recommendations.overview: In 1920s New York City, a Black woman finds her world upended when her life becomes intertwined with a former childhood friend who's passing as white.

recommendations.title: The Valachi Papers
recommendations.overview: When Joe Valachi has a price put on his head by Don Vito Genovese, he must take desperate steps to protect himself while in prison. An unsuccessful attempt to slit his throat puts him over the edge to break the sacred code of silence.

recommendations.title: Close
recommendations.overview: A counter-terrorism expert takes a job protecting a young heiress. After an attempted kidnapping puts both of their lives in danger, they must flee.

recommendations.title: Perdida
recommendations.overview: A policewoman whose childhood friend disappeared in Patagonia years ago starts a new search to find answers, and soon finds her own life in danger.

recommendations.title: Echo Boomers
recommendations.overview: Five post grads figure the best way to get back at the unfair economy and live the life they've always wanted is to steal from the rich and give to themselves.

recommendations.title: Violet & Daisy
recommendations.overview: Two teenage assassins accept what they think will be a quick-and-easy job, until an unexpected target throws them off their plan.

recommendations.title: Big Nothing
recommendations.overview: A frustrated, unemployed teacher joins forces with a scammer and his girlfriend in a blackmailing scheme.

recommendations.title: Fantomas vs. Scotland Yard
recommendations.overview: In the third and final episode of the trilogy, Fantômas imposes a head tax on the rich, threatening to kill those who do not comply.
